VAL-FOUND-007.reason: StatusEffectSystem.test.ts (65 tests) covers all 6 status effect lifecycles. Burn: apply with duration/tick rate, 1s ticks, stacking from multiple sources, expiry, no immobilization. Freeze: apply/immobilize, speed=0, no damage ticks, diminishing returns, immunity after 2nd, DR reset, clean expiry. Poison: apply, 1s DoT ticks, refresh policy (stronger value kept, duration refreshed), heal reduction active during poison, no immobilization. Bleed: apply, 1s ticks (ignores defense), stacking from multiple sources, cumulative damage, no immobilization. Slow: apply/speed reduction, 20% minimum speed floor, no damage ticks, replace policy (stronger slow wins), expiry restores speed, no immobilization. Stun: apply/immobilize, speed=0, DR 50%, immunity window, clean expiry. Entity death cleanup: clears all effects, clears DR records, no cross-entity effects. All 65 tests pass.

VAL-FOUND-008.reason: StatusEffectSystem.test.ts covers interaction edge cases: Freeze has diminishing returns on reapplication (50% on 2nd, immune on 3rd) with DR reset after window. Multiple Poison stacks follow refresh policy (keep stronger value, refresh duration). Slow doesn't reduce speed below 20% of base (SLOW_MIN_SPEED_FACTOR). 'Monster applies effects to player' suite (3 tests) verifies fire monster applies burn to player, monster applies poison with heal reduction, and monster applies slow to player. Freeze and slow coexist with freeze taking priority (speed=0 while frozen, reverts to slow after freeze expires). Independent DR tracks for freeze and stun. All pass.
